observations.note: Normalized domain section headers from lowercase to title case (e.g., '## legal Domain' to '## Legal Domain') for consistency with document title casing convention. All 5 domain headers updated.

Standardized business model bullet phrasing from mixed 'model applicable'/'model specific' to consistent 'model specific' across all four model types. Eliminates inconsistency in parallel list structure.

Consolidated redundant cognitive load explanation. The Progressive Disclosure introductory paragraph and the Rationale subsection contained overlapping content (overwhelm, cognitive load, ADHD). Merged unique keywords (manageable, digestible, attention, solo founders) into the opening paragraph and removed the Rationale subsection. Reduced file from 98 to 93 lines.
All 44 tests across 4 suites (AC1: 10, AC2: 14, AC3: 10, AC4: 10) remained GREEN after each of the 3 refactoring steps. Tests validated after each individual step, not just at the end.
